task_completion.description: Verify the 'VIP Support' mailbox was created
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a mailbox named 'VIP Support' (with email vip@helpdesk.local) in the mailboxes list or settings menu.

task_completion.description: Verify Alex Chen's mailbox permissions are updated
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Alex Chen's user profile or permissions page. He should have access granted to 'VIP Support' and access revoked/unchecked for 'Billing Support'.

task_completion.description: Verify Maria Rodriguez's mailbox permissions are updated
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at Maria Rodriguez's user profile or permissions page. She should have access granted to both 'Technical Support' and 'VIP Support'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'VIP Priority Response' saved reply was created
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Saved Replies settings or a reply dropdown. There should be a saved reply named 'VIP Priority Response' containing the text: 'Dear valued customer, your case has been flagged as high priority...'

task_completion.description: Verify all 'vip' tagged conversations were moved to the VIP Support mailbox
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the conversation list inside the 'VIP Support' mailbox. There should be exactly 4 conversations visible, and they should have the 'vip' tag.

task_completion.description: Verify the conversations in the VIP Support mailbox are assigned to Alex Chen
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'VIP Support' mailbox conversation list, check the assignee column or avatar for the 4 conversations. They should all be assigned to Alex Chen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the helpdesk web UI at http://localhost:8080, not terminal commands (like curl or mysql) executing backend changes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual helpdesk application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be a fully rendered web application (e.g., FreeScout), not a text editor modifying database files or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of SQL queries, PHP scripts, or database administration tools (like phpMyAdmin) being used to alter users, mailboxes, or conversations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 'VIP Support' mailbox (vip@helpdesk.local). Alex Chen (alex.chen@helpdesk.local) must be removed from 'Billing Support' and added to 'VIP Support'. Maria Rodriguez (maria.rodriguez@helpdesk.local) must have access to 'Technical Support' and 'VIP Support'. A saved reply named 'VIP Priority Response' must be created with the exact text: 'Dear valued customer, your case has been flagged as high priority and assigned to our dedicated VIP support team. A senior support specialist will contact you within 1 business hour.' Exactly 4 conversations tagged 'vip' must be moved to the 'VIP Support' mailbox and assigned to Alex Chen.
